title: アグネスデジタル、爆発す

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Arrrgh! Yeooowch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A-whaaahhh! Hrrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, I happen upon Agnes Digital
writhing in pain after having fallen on her face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Someone... anyone... will you please... listen to my
tale?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you see, I've caught the "I'll-die-if-I-don't-gush-about-my-oshi" disease... Cough.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh? So will you lend me your ear?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm supplied on a daily basis with moe,
preciousness, and major feels from all my adorbs
Umas! They're like an endless source of energy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But all those feels of love and affection keep
swelling within me, and now I'm about to hit
critical mass! Uwagyah! I'm gonna explode!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I need to keep gushing about my oshis! It's the
only way to flush out all this otaku fervor!
Otherwise I'll die of sheer bliss!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do you say, Trainer? Will you hearken
to my otaku sagas? Think of it as saving a poor,
pitiful soul.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Unless I do something quick, all the euphoria and
feels inside me are going to trigger a big bang!
It'll give rise to a brand-new universe!
choice_data_list:
I don't get what you're talking about, but I'll
listen if it helps.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Bless your heavenly hospitality! You're my savior, my guardian angel, my deity!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-now then, the ones I most feel like gushing
about are City and Ayabe... Which would you like
to hear about?
choice_data_list: I want to hear about Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay! City it is! One mesmerizing tale about City
coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying, but Umamusume as
beautiful as City are probs only born once every
hundred years!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: She's a super precious lady who models and races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She does have one shortcoming, however—she's a
real sleepyhead. At least that's what everyone
says around here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But that's just a drop of cuteness in her ocean of
beauty. And get this! City's roommate is the
hot-blooded head of the disciplinary committee,
Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: They're both upstanding students, but apparently in the mornings, Bamboo has to do everything for City.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And listen to this... I saw it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In the early hours of the morning, I saw City and
Bamboo heading to school together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was obvious that City was super sleepy. She was
nodding off and stumbling as she walked.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And get this—with a wry smile, she...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bamboo let City rest her head on her shoulder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was two totally adorbs Umas walking leisurely
in a cozy embrace!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And this next part will blow your mind... I heard
City murmur something.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Thanks, Daddy...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Haha, don't mention it. No big deal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Ayabe it is! One mesmerizing tale about
Ayabe coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe is an Umamusume widely admired for her
elegant beauty and air of cool indifference!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She's super gorgeous and dignified, and always
maintains this stoic aura.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But everyone around here says she's actually very
kind and often looks out for others.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One of her classmates is the pure and super cute
Doto! She's actually a real ditz, so Ayabe helps
her out from behind the scenes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just can't handle it! The way Ayabe protects
Doto is so precious! Is that the kind of powerful
bond classmates can form through a heartfelt
friendship?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And listen to this... I saw it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One day, Doto was carrying this massive box, and
she looked ready to topple over at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but worry as I watched her
stumbling around with that huge box in her arms.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But what I saw next sent shock waves through my body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe was stealthily following Doto... with a
concerned expression on her face!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She kept her distance, but I could tell how
anxious she was! She was like a caring mother
watching over her daughter after sending her out
on an errand!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then, as you'd expect, Doto eventually lost her
balance! But just as she was about to fall...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It happened! Ayabe leapt nimbly into action! She
swooped in to catch Doto like some kind of
superhero!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto was saved from a painful rendezvous with
the ground!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And what I heard them say after that will blow
your mind...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-Ayabe?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't mention it... I was just passing by.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gwhaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyuugyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nnddwaaaiieeaaii!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Precious! So adorbs! So charming! So, so PRECIOUSSSSS!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
NGHAJFHAGAJNVD! AAAAAHHH! I'm gonna
EXPLOOOOODE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the immense feelings of affection that
Agnes Digital holds for the Umamusume trigger a
big bang that gives rise to a new universe.
